mapper.select:
SELECT C.COMM_NO AS commNo, C.COMM_MBR_ID AS commMbrId, M.MBR_NICKNAME AS mbrNickname, C.COMM_CAT_CD AS commCatCd, C.COMM_AIS_NO AS commAisNo, TC1.CMM_CD_NAME AS theme1Name, TC2.CMM_CD_NAME AS theme2Name, TC3.CMM_CD_NAME AS theme3Name, C.COMM_PLC_NO AS commPlcNo, P.PLC_NAME AS plcName, COALESCE(R.RGN_NAME, AR.RGN_NAME) AS rgnName, C.COMM_MAIN_IMG_URL AS commMainImgUrl, C.COMM_TITLE AS commTitle, C.COMM_CONTENT AS commContent, C.COMM_INQIRE_CNT AS commInqireCnt, C.COMM_LIKE_CNT AS commLikeCnt, C.COMM_CMNT_CNT AS commCmntCnt, DATE_FORMAT(C.COMM_REG_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d') AS commRegDate, DATE_FORMAT(C.COMM_UP_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d') AS commUpDate, C.COMM_USE_YN AS commUseYn, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT H.HTAG_TAG_NAME) AS hashtagText FROM COMMUNITY C JOIN MEMBER M ON C.COMM_MBR_ID = M.MBR_ID
LEFT JOIN AI_SCHEDULE AIS ON C.COMM_AIS_NO = AIS.AIS_NO
LEFT JOIN REGION AR ON AIS.AIS_RGN_NO = AR.RGN_NO
LEFT JOIN CMM_CODE TC1 ON AIS.AIS_THEME1_CD = TC1.CMM_CD
LEFT JOIN CMM_CODE TC2 ON AIS.AIS_THEME2_CD = TC2.CMM_CD
LEFT JOIN CMM_CODE TC3 ON AIS.AIS_THEME3_CD = TC3.CMM_CD
LEFT JOIN PLACE P ON C.COMM_PLC_NO = P.PLC_NO LEFT JOIN REGION R ON P.PLC_RGN_CD = R.RGN_CD LEFT JOIN COMMUNITY_HASHTAG CH ON C.COMM_NO = CH.CHTG_COMM_NO LEFT JOIN HASHTAG H ON CH.CHTG_HTAG_NO = H.HTAG_NO WHERE C.COMM_USE_YN = 'Y' AND C.COMM_CAT_CD = #{catCd}
AND C.COMM_TITLE LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND ( REPLACE(C.COMM_CONTENT, ' ', '') LIKE CONCAT('%', REPLACE(#{keyword}, ' ', ''), '%') OR REPLACE(P.PLC_NAME, ' ', '') LIKE CONCAT('%', REPLACE(#{keyword}, ' ', ''), '%') OR REPLACE(COALESCE(R.RGN_NAME, AR.RGN_NAME), ' ', '') LIKE CONCAT('%', REPLACE(#{keyword}, ' ', ''), '%') )
AND M.MBR_NICKNAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND H.HTAG_TAG_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND ( C.COMM_TITLE LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR C.COMM_CONTENT LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR M.MBR_NICKNAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR P.PLC_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR R.RGN_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR H.HTAG_TAG_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR TC1.CMM_CD_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR TC2.CMM_CD_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR TC3.CMM_CD_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
GROUP BY C.COMM_NO
ORDER BY C.COMM_LIKE_CNT DESC, C.COMM_NO DESC
ORDER BY C.COMM_INQIRE_CNT DESC, C.COMM_NO DESC
ORDER BY C.COMM_CMNT_CNT DESC, C.COMM_NO DESC
ORDER BY C.COMM_NO DESC
LIMIT #{offset}, #{size}

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT C.COMM_NO) FROM COMMUNITY C JOIN MEMBER M ON C.COMM_MBR_ID = M.MBR_ID LEFT JOIN PLACE P ON C.COMM_PLC_NO = P.PLC_NO LEFT JOIN REGION R ON P.PLC_RGN_CD = R.RGN_CD LEFT JOIN COMMUNITY_HASHTAG CH ON C.COMM_NO = CH.CHTG_COMM_NO LEFT JOIN HASHTAG H ON CH.CHTG_HTAG_NO = H.HTAG_NO WHERE C.COMM_USE_YN = 'Y' AND C.COMM_CAT_CD = #{catCd}
AND C.COMM_TITLE LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND ( REPLACE(C.COMM_CONTENT, ' ', '') LIKE CONCAT('%', REPLACE(#{keyword}, ' ', ''), '%') OR REPLACE(P.PLC_NAME, ' ', '') LIKE CONCAT('%', REPLACE(#{keyword}, ' ', ''), '%') OR REPLACE(R.RGN_NAME, ' ', '') LIKE CONCAT('%', REPLACE(#{keyword}, ' ', ''), '%') )
AND M.MBR_NICKNAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND H.HTAG_TAG_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND ( C.COMM_TITLE LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR C.COMM_CONTENT LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR M.MBR_NICKNAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR P.PLC_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR R.RGN_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR H.HTAG_TAG_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )

SELECT C.COMM_NO AS commNo, C.COMM_MBR_ID AS commMbrId, M.MBR_NICKNAME AS mbrNickname, C.COMM_CAT_CD AS commCatCd, C.COMM_AIS_NO AS commAisNo,
TC1.CMM_CD_NAME AS theme1Name, TC2.CMM_CD_NAME AS theme2Name, TC3.CMM_CD_NAME AS theme3Name,
C.COMM_PLC_NO AS commPlcNo, P.PLC_NAME AS plcName, R.RGN_CD AS rgnCd, COALESCE(R.RGN_NAME, AR.RGN_NAME) AS rgnName, CC.CMM_CD AS plcCatCd, CC.CMM_CD_NAME AS plcCatName,
C.COMM_MAIN_IMG_URL AS commMainImgUrl, C.COMM_TITLE AS commTitle, C.COMM_CONTENT AS commContent, C.COMM_INQIRE_CNT AS commInqireCnt, C.COMM_LIKE_CNT AS commLikeCnt, C.COMM_CMNT_CNT AS commCmntCnt, DATE_FORMAT(C.COMM_REG_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d') AS commRegDate, DATE_FORMAT(C.COMM_UP_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d') AS commUpDate, C.COMM_USE_YN AS commUseYn, GROUP_CONCAT(H.HTAG_TAG_NAME) AS hashtagText FROM COMMUNITY C JOIN MEMBER M ON C.COMM_MBR_ID = M.MBR_ID
LEFT JOIN AI_SCHEDULE AIS ON C.COMM_AIS_NO = AIS.AIS_NO
LEFT JOIN CMM_CODE TC1 ON AIS.AIS_THEME1_CD = TC1.CMM_CD
LEFT JOIN CMM_CODE TC2 ON AIS.AIS_THEME2_CD = TC2.CMM_CD
LEFT JOIN CMM_CODE TC3 ON AIS.AIS_THEME3_CD = TC3.CMM_CD
LEFT JOIN REGION AR ON AIS.AIS_RGN_NO = AR.RGN_NO
LEFT JOIN PLACE P ON C.COMM_PLC_NO = P.PLC_NO
LEFT JOIN REGION R ON P.PLC_RGN_CD = R.RGN_CD
LEFT JOIN CMM_CODE CC ON P.PLC_CAT_CD = CC.CMM_CD
LEFT JOIN COMMUNITY_HASHTAG CH ON C.COMM_NO = CH.CHTG_COMM_NO
LEFT JOIN HASHTAG H ON CH.CHTG_HTAG_NO = H.HTAG_NO WHERE C.COMM_USE_YN = 'Y' AND C.COMM_NO = #{commNo} GROUP BY C.COMM_NO
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO COMMUNITY ( COMM_MBR_ID, COMM_CAT_CD, COMM_AIS_NO, COMM_PLC_NO, COMM_TITLE, COMM_CONTENT, COMM_MAIN_IMG_URL ) VALUES ( #{commMbrId}, #{commCatCd}, #{commAisNo}, #{commPlcNo}, #{commTitle}, #{commContent}, #{commMainImgUrl} )
mapper.update: UPDATE COMMUNITY SET COMM_TITLE = #{commTitle}, COMM_CONTENT = #{commContent}, COMM_MAIN_IMG_URL = #{commMainImgUrl}, COMM_AIS_NO = #{commAisNo}, COMM_PLC_NO = #{commPlcNo}, COMM_UP_DATE = NOW() WHERE COMM_NO = #{commNo}
UPDATE COMMUNITY SET COMM_USE_YN = 'N', COMM_UP_DATE = NOW() WHERE COMM_NO = #{commNo}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO HASHTAG ( HTAG_TAG_NAME, HTAG_USE_CNT ) VALUES ( #{tagName}, 0 )
mapper.select: SELECT H.HTAG_TAG_NAME FROM HASHTAG H JOIN COMMUNITY_HASHTAG CH ON H.HTAG_NO = CH.CHTG_HTAG_NO JOIN COMMUNITY C ON CH.CHTG_COMM_NO = C.COMM_NO WHERE C.COMM_USE_YN = 'Y' AND C.COMM_CAT_CD = #{catCd} GROUP BY H.HTAG_NO, H.HTAG_TAG_NAME ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC, H.HTAG_NO DESC LIMIT 5
mapper.update:
UPDATE FILE SET FILE_USE_YN = 'N' WHERE FILE_NO IN
#{fileNo}
mapper.select: SELECT F.FILE_PATH FROM COMMUNITY_FILE_MAP CFM JOIN FILE F ON CFM.CFM_FILE_NO = F.FILE_NO WHERE CFM.CFM_COMM_NO = #{commNo} AND F.FILE_USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY CFM.CFM_SORT_ORDR ASC

SELECT F.FILE_NO FROM COMMUNITY_FILE_MAP CFM JOIN FILE F ON CFM.CFM_FILE_NO = F.FILE_NO WHERE CFM.CFM_COMM_NO = #{commNo} AND F.FILE_USE_YN = 'Y' AND F.FILE_PATH IN
#{filePath}
SELECT RGN_CD AS rgnCd, RGN_NAME AS rgnName FROM REGION ORDER BY RGN_CD ASC
SELECT CMM_CD AS cmmCd, CMM_CD_NAME AS cmmCdName FROM CMM_CODE WHERE CMM_GROUP_CD = 'GRP002' AND CMM_USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY CMM_SORT_ORDR ASC
SELECT PLC_NO AS plcNo, PLC_NAME AS plcName FROM PLACE WHERE PLC_RGN_CD = #{rgnCd} AND PLC_CAT_CD = #{catCd} AND PLC_USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY PLC_NAME ASC
mapper.sql:
AND C.COMM_CAT_CD = #{catCd}
AND (C.COMM_TITLE LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR M.MBR_NICKNAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
AND C.COMM_USE_YN = 'Y'
AND C.COMM_USE_YN = 'N' AND ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM REPORT R WHERE R.RPT_COMM_NO = C.COMM_NO AND R.RPT_STATUS_CD != 'RST004' ) < 5
AND C.COMM_USE_YN = 'N' AND ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM REPORT R WHERE R.RPT_COMM_NO = C.COMM_NO AND R.RPT_STATUS_CD != 'RST004' ) >= 5
mapper.select:
SELECT C.COMM_NO AS commNo, C.COMM_MBR_ID AS commMbrId, M.MBR_NICKNAME AS mbrNickname, C.COMM_CAT_CD AS commCatCd, C.COMM_TITLE AS commTitle, C.COMM_INQIRE_CNT AS commInqireCnt, C.COMM_LIKE_CNT AS commLikeCnt, C.COMM_CMNT_CNT AS commCmntCnt, DATE_FORMAT(C.COMM_REG_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d') AS commRegDate, C.COMM_USE_YN AS commUseYn, /* 원문에 달린 유효한 누적 신고 수 (반려된 RST004 제외) 계산 */ (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM REPORT R WHERE R.RPT_COMM_NO = C.COMM_NO AND R.RPT_STATUS_CD != 'RST004') AS reportCnt FROM COMMUNITY C JOIN MEMBER M ON C.COMM_MBR_ID = M.MBR_ID WHERE 1=1
ORDER BY C.COMM_NO DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{size}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM COMMUNITY C JOIN MEMBER M ON C.COMM_MBR_ID = M.MBR_ID WHERE 1=1
mapper.update: UPDATE COMMUNITY SET COMM_USE_YN = #{useYn}, COMM_UP_DATE = NOW() WHERE COMM_NO = #{commNo}
